_meta.rationale: Week 1 of SEO pivot editorial calendar. 14 articles: 7 eSIM guides (P1, monetization via Airalo/Holafly/Ubigi affiliates) + 7 consolidation pieces (comparison, budget, practical, itinerary, flight, visa). 2 articles/day, AM=consolidation PM=eSIM. Keyword-targeted for FR search volume.
_meta.esim_affiliate_note: eSIM articles target Airalo/Holafly/Ubigi affiliate revenue. Every PM slot = eSIM content.

diversity_check.rule: No two consecutive articles on the same primary country. AM=consolidation, PM=eSIM (different geo focus by design).

validation.note: TH again but separated by Indonesia eSIM
Back-to-back Vietnam (eau robinet + e-visa) but different types (practical vs visa). Acceptable because PM Day6 and AM Day7 are overnight gap.

flagged_pairs.reason: Back-to-back Vietnam. Mitigated by overnight gap and different content types (practical vs visa).

thailande.note: Comparison + budget + practical + scams + flights. Strongest existing cluster, consolidation focus.

vietnam.note: Itinerary + practical + visa. Builds topical authority for Vietnam cluster.

indexing_forecast.note: Google crawls new content from established sites within 48-72h. Full SERP stabilization takes 2-4 weeks from publish date. eSIM articles may index faster due to commercial intent.

github_actions.why_3h_utc: 10h Paris / 10h Bangkok — crawl window before reel at 05h00 UTC. Googlebot crawls new content overnight for FR users.
github_actions.why_8h_utc: 15h Paris / 15h Bangkok — late afternoon French audience peak. Clear of 10h30 reel slot.
github_actions.stagger_from_reels: Reels at 05h00/10h30/16h00 UTC. Articles at 03h00/08h00 UTC. Zero conflict.
